title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!
